mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Alma and Eddie try to write the winning Song of Summer.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Alma's Summertime Musical (ASL)

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Daniel learns that there are so many exciting things to do on a trip with your family.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Tiger Family Trip

entries.title: The Rhythm and Roots of Arthur

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Great-Grand Uncle Theo is celebrating his 85th birthday, so the Reads (and Buster) visit!
mediaManagerAsset.title: The Rhythm and Roots of Arthur

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Roxy the Hedgehog and Ronald the Piglet are on an adventure to find the 'Wows' of this planet.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Wowsabout!

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Buddy and the Pteranodon family ride the Dinosaur Train, picking up theropod friends.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Dinosaur Train: Big City Dinosaur

entries.title: Nature Cat's Nature Movie Special Extraordinaire

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Nature Cat and his pals realize they've come to the end of their Nature Curiosity List.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Nature Cat's Nature Movie Special Extraordinaire

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: The future of Cyberspace is at stake.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Cyberchase: The Movie

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Daniel visits his friend Juan Carlos in a new neighborhood.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Daniel Visits a New Neighborhood

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Whyatt and his friends travel around the world.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Around the World Adventure

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: It's springtime! And a little monkey has a big case of spring fever.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Curious George Swings into Spring

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Xavier travels to meet heroes Christopher Reeve, Kitty O’Neil, Oprah Winfrey, and his own ancestor.
mediaManagerAsset.title: I am Full of Possibilities

properties.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Ari’s plushie gets taken by an eagle.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Adventure in Moose Mountain

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Stu gets lost delivering cookies, and Lyla has to figure out how to bring him back home.
mediaManagerAsset.title: When We Met Stu

entries.title: Sid The Science Kid: The Movie

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Sid and Gabriela are thrilled to win a contest to explore the new Super Ultimate Science Museum!
mediaManagerAsset.title: Sid The Science Kid: The Movie

entries.title: Molly of Denali: Wise Raven and Old Crow

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Molly takes an epic boat trip to her family in Canada for a ceremony honoring her grandma.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Molly of Denali: Wise Raven and Old Crow

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Carl’s excited to trick-or-treat with friends for candy wrappers to add to his collection!
mediaManagerAsset.title: A Fuzzytown Halloween

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Daniel Tiger and Donkey Hodie meet for the first time in Someplace Else.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Daniel Tiger Visits Someplace Else

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Olive and Otto team up with the new Odd Squad to disprove Team Weird and prevent oddness!
mediaManagerAsset.title: Odd Squad: The Movie

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Sing and dance with Alma and friends in this sing-along version of Alma's Summertime Musical!
mediaManagerAsset.title: Alma's Summertime Musical (Sing-Along)

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Alma and Eddie try to write the winning Song of Summer.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Alma's Summertime Musical

entries.title: Elinor Wonders Why: A Wonderful Journey (ASL)

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Elinor and her friends have a curious and fun adventure when they go camping.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Elinor Wonders Why: A Wonderful Journey (ASL)

entries.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Movie: I am Madam President

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Yadina goes on a journey to meet some of history’s boldest women.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Movie: I am Madam President

properties.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum

entries.title: Acoustic Rooster and His Barnyard Band

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: A guitar-playing Rooster journeys to the Bebop Barnyard and learns to play in a jazz band.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Acoustic Rooster and His Barnyard Band

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Donkey Hodie, Cousin Hodie, and Purple Panda visit new sights around Someplace Else.
mediaManagerAsset.title: A Donkey Hodie Road Trip

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: When the Wild Kratts are in trouble, they learn Kid Power is perhaps the strongest creature power!
mediaManagerAsset.title: Wild Kratts: Activate Kid Power!

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: When the others lose their power and nature needs defending, Nature Cat will rise to the occasion!
mediaManagerAsset.title: The Nature-tastic Four Movie

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Sean and Sydney join the Propulsion family for an epic adventure to Bortron 7.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Back to Bortron 7

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Oona, Olympia, and Otis accidentally change the past and undo every case ever solved.
mediaManagerAsset.title: World Turned Odd

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: The gang learns about Neil Armstrong and has a sleepover on the moon!
mediaManagerAsset.title: One Small Step

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Musical film by The Okee Dokee Brothers. Fox and Badger return home, reconnect, and heal.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Brambletown

entries.title: Wild Kratts: Our Blue and Green World

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: The Kratt brothers disagree on what’s better: blue oceans or green forests.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Wild Kratts: Our Blue and Green World

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: A green haze is heating up Stellandia. Can the CyberSquad and Bernice find the source?
mediaManagerAsset.title: Weather or Not

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: The Pinkertons go on a family vacation roadtrip!
mediaManagerAsset.title: A Pinkerton Family Vacation

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: There's a new hero in town! Miss Power has super strength, speed and a secret weapon...
mediaManagerAsset.title: The Rise of Miss Power

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Pinkalicious is excited for her most pinkaperfect birthday party ever!
mediaManagerAsset.title: A Pinkaperfect Birthday!

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Molly helps Grandpa Nat fulfill his dream of climbing to the top of Denali.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Molly and the Great One

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Alma and her family visit Puerto Rico.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Alma Goes to Puerto Rico

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: TBA
mediaManagerAsset.title: Submarine Adventure

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Pinkalicious and Peter trade places with Cupid to deliver valentines to everyone.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Cupid Calls It Quits

entries.title: Elinor Wonders Why: A Wonderful Journey

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Elinor and her friends have a curious and fun adventure when they go camping.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Elinor Wonders Why: A Wonderful Journey

entries.title: What's at the Center of the Earth

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: The kids take a journey on the Drill Engine Train to the center of Earth.
mediaManagerAsset.title: What's at the Center of the Earth

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Rocket and Little Yellow Bird learn the wonder of words and together they save the town.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Rocket Saves the Day

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Hacker's storm of trash has hit cyberspace and it's up to the Cybersquad to save the day!
mediaManagerAsset.title: Space Waste Odyssey

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: The Kratts track the incredible salmon run and connect with amazing creatures in Alaska!
mediaManagerAsset.title: Wild Kratts: Hero's Journey

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don are off to camp!
mediaManagerAsset.title: Nature Trackers Adventure Camp

entries.title: Won’t You Sing Along With Me?

mediaManagerAsset.description_short: Daniel has lots of feelings when he can’t go to the Neighborhood Carnival this year.
mediaManagerAsset.title: Won’t You Sing Along With Me?
